ForgeCI
1
2
3
4

Connect your first repo

Step 1 of 4 — takes about 2 minutes total

Where does your code live?

Select a repository to enable builds on:

We detected Node.js. Here's a starter pipeline — edit or use as-is:

.forge/pipeline.yml 
version: '2'
pipelines:
  default:
    - step:
        name: Install dependencies
        caches: [node]
        script:
          - npm ci
    - parallel:
        - step:
            name: Test
            script:
              - npm test
        - step:
            name: Lint & type-check
            script:
              - npm run lint
              - npm run typecheck
    - step:
        name: Build
        script:
          - npm run build
        artifacts:
          - dist/**
◆ Everything is ready!
GitHub connected
acme-corp/api-service

Push a commit to trigger
